form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 2nd of 7 at this track on April 6 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind La Bombonera carrying 58kg at $2.55. The start before that 3rd in a small field at this track on March 29 over 1600m, 15 len behind Wardenclyffe carrying 60kg at $18.60. Progressing well and a win is on the cards.
